name: aimeos/prisma
description: A powerful PHP package for integrating media related Large Language Models (LLMs) into your applications

scripts-descriptions.test: Run the unit test suite (mocked HTTP, no API keys needed)
scripts-descriptions.test:integration: Run the live integration tests (requires provider API keys)
scripts-descriptions.test:coverage: Run the unit suite with code coverage (requires Xdebug or PCOV)
